calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-16-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Stanley Pond, Esq. for Plaintiff: Charlene Cunningham Whitmore.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After considering the Declaration of Plaintiff Charlene Cunningham Whitmore in support of Default Judgment, and hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: William Whitmore, Jr. as follows:
Principal $52,836.00
Prejudgment Interest $15,642.07
Costs $449.50, for a total of $68,927.57
See scanned doc. for details of Judgment in connection with the proceeds of sale of real property listed.
Judgment signed in open court.
